heading: Assistant chief
label: 193 Assistant chief
text: There shall be in the Children’s Bureau, until otherwise provided for by law, an assistant chief, to be appointed by the Secretary of Health and Human Services.
notes: CodificationSection 3 of act , also provided for compensation of assistant chief and for appointment and compensation of other employees of the bureau.Apr. 9, 1912Section was formerly classified to , Labor.section 18b of Title 29

Change of Name“Secretary of Health and Human Services” substituted in text for “Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare” pursuant to , which is classified to , Education.section 509(b) of Pub. L. 96–88section 3508(b) of Title 20“Secretary of Labor” substituted for “Secretary of Commerce and Labor” pursuant to act . See note set out under .Mar. 4, 1913section 191 of this title
